intent: zero/stub output implementation copied from starter must not satisfy hidden behavior checker

why_wrong: Raises the vin enable threshold from 0.25 V to 0.45 V, rejecting the public low-trim operating point while preserving reset and output scaling.
Uses the correct clock/reset contract but an under-relaxed trim update coefficient, so the bias does not reach the low-trim target window.
Treats reset polarity as active-low, keeping the bias disabled during the valid trim window.
Scales only the metric output low while preserving the bias voltage path.
Forces the upper trim target below the settled lower trim target.
